#  Edit a Custom RFI Report 
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfi-project/permissions)
  * **Additional Information** :
    * The data displayed in the custom portfolio reports is dynamically generated and always reflects current project data.
    * Custom RFI reports are only viewable under the RFIs tool; they are not shown under the Reports tool.


##  Demo 
![Edit Custom Rfi Report](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/0df1faf0b25299cf5efe928e535821fa/d63574317e462e52bb48e96083c49bb3/edit-custom-rfi-report.gif?fm=webp)
##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **RFIs** tool.
  2. Click **Edit**. 
  3. Edit the report content as desired.
     * You can edit the type, name, sort by preferences, columns, and/or filtering according to your needs.
     * When you edit the RFI report type, those changes will automatically be reflected. For example, if you previously marked a report as personal and unchecked that option, the report will now be visible to everyone in the project (if it is a project-specific report), or everyone in each of the company's projects (if it is a 'global' report).
     * For more information, see [Create and View a Custom RFI Report](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfi-project/tutorials/create-and-view-an-rfi-report).
  4. Click **Update Report** . 


## See Also
  * [Configure Advanced Settings: RFIs](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfi-project/tutorials/configure-advanced-settings-rfis)
  * [What fieldset configurations are recommended for configurable fieldsets?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-fieldset-configurations-are-recommended-for-configurable-fieldsets)
  * [What are configurable fieldsets and which Procore tools support them?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-are-configurable-fieldsets-and-which-procore-tools-support-them)
title: Edit a Custom RFI Report
description: How to a custom RFI report's type, name, preferences, columns, and/or filtering.
